---
title: "Publications"
---

## Recent Publications

::: {.publication-item}
### Agricultural drought monitoring using Google Earth Engine: a study of Paschim Medinipur district, West Bengal

![Agricultural Drought Analysis](https://placehold.co/800x400/2c7da0/ffffff?text=Drought+Monitoring+Analysis)

**Book:** Modern Cartography Series<br>
**Year:** 2024
[View Publication](https://www.researchgate.net/publication/384435525_Agricultural_drought_monitoring_using_Google_Earth_Engine_a_study_of_Paschim_Medinipur_district_West_Bengal) | [Download PDF](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1P0k1iLDrUPfr0BSYS7Xi_a6muw2Ox2Zz/view?usp=sharing)

This study analyzes agricultural drought in Paschim Medinipur, West Bengal, using Google Earth Engine with satellite and climate datasets from 2002–2022. It assesses precipitation variability, drought indices, vegetation responses, and climate trends.
:::

::: {.publication-item}
### Application of analytic hierarchy process for mapping flood vulnerability in Odisha using Google Earth Engine

![Flood Vulnerability Map](https://placehold.co/800x400/27ae60/ffffff?text=Flood+Vulnerability+AHP)

**Book:** Google Earth Engine and Artificial Intelligence for Earth Observation<br>
**Year:** 2025
[View Publication](https://www.researchgate.net/publication/390714931_Application_of_analytic_hierarchy_process_for_mapping_flood_vulnerability_in_Odisha_using_Google_Earth_Engine) | [Download PDF](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1QhhcVkj7_kMIuh1LOCtFqU0NM3OWUHB8/view?usp=sharing)

This study demonstrates the use of AHP in Google Earth Engine to identify vulnerable areas for flood hazards in Odisha. Key parameters include elevation, rainfall, land cover, slope, TWI, NDVI, and soil.
:::

## Other Works

- Pradhan, P. (2023). "Remote Sensing in the Anthropocene." In *Modern Geography: A Review*. Springer.

---

For a full list of publications, please visit my [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=_DhEQHEAAAAJ) or [ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Pulakesh-Pradhan) profile.
